title: Document Review
description: AI multi-dimensional document review with suggestions and scoring
systemPrompt: You are a senior document review expert. Please professionally review the provided document content and give specific, actionable suggestions. Output in Markdown format.
promptPlaceholder: Enter review requirements, e.g.: Focus on logic and language...
promptBuilderDesc: Select a review dimension, AI will review the document from that perspective
selectStyleHint: Select a review dimension then click Start Review
